01

About Me

I'm a Computer Science student at Lovely Professional University, Pursing CSE with specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. I enjoy turning complex, messy data into impactful solutions that solve real-world problems.

From building predictive analytics dashboards with 0.88 ROC-AUC to designing AI-powered computer vision safety systems, I combine rigorous data engineering with practical ML to deliver measurable results.

I completed a Data Science internship at BEIYO, where I built geospatial viability models and an XGBoost occupancy prediction system achieving 87% accuracy. Currently pursuing my B.Tech in CSE (2023–2027), I'm actively seeking opportunities where I can contribute to cutting-edge AI/ML projects.

03

Experience

BEIYO
Data Science Intern
Jun 2025 — Sep 2025
  • Identified high-potential PG outreach locations by integrating rental data from 99acres, NoBroker, and NestAway with AISHE/UGC, state IT portal, and Census of India datasets.
  • Collected, cleaned, and preprocessed multi-source data using Python, performing EDA and feature engineering to develop Affordability and Demand scores combined into a Viability Index.
  • Built an XGBoost-based PG Occupancy Prediction Model achieving 87% prediction accuracy in estimating expected PG occupancy trends across target cities.
  • Delivered insights through geospatial heatmaps and an interactive Streamlit dashboard, enabling data-driven decisions for targeted PG expansion and outreach strategy.
04

Projects

Project 01  ·  Oct – Dec 2025
Customer Retention Intelligence & Revenue Risk Dashboard
StreamlitXGBoost TensorFlowPlotly ANNPython
  • Architected an end-to-end analytics platform visualizing real-time risk patterns across 10,000+ customer records to drive data-informed retention strategies.
  • Engineered a hybrid predictive model combining XGBoost and Artificial Neural Networks, attaining 0.88 ROC-AUC and 86% accuracy in identifying high-value attrition risks.
  • Designed a dynamic Financial ROI Engine to calculate Customer Lifetime Value (CLV), enabling a path to reduce revenue churn by 30% through targeted interventions.
Live Demo
Project 02  ·  Jun – Jul 2025
VisionGuard: AI-Powered Industrial Safety System
TensorFlowOpenCV CNNHSV Calibration Python
  • Designed and trained a 4-layer CNN in TensorFlow on a custom dataset of 2,000+ images, using data augmentation to improve generalization.
  • Engineered a real-time detection pipeline using OpenCV and HSV Color Calibration, achieving 85% accuracy by precisely tracking hand contours in diverse lighting.
  • Implemented a virtual safety barrier using Euclidean distance logic, triggering real-time Safe, Warning, and Danger alerts with low-latency webcam processing.
GitHub
Project 03  ·  Feb – Mar 2025
Smart Traffic Signal Optimization System
Genetic AlgorithmsRandom Forest FlaskPython
  • Built an intelligent traffic controller using Genetic Algorithms and Random Forest, achieving 89% prediction accuracy to preemptively adjust signal timings for congestion.
  • Simulated a realistic 24-hour traffic flow with 1,000+ vehicle records, training the system to handle heavy rush-hour patterns effectively.
  • Reduced average waiting times by 25% compared to static signals by designing a priority engine that instantly reconfigures phases for emergency vehicles.
